ward_recs.action_text: Zone 3 supply is severely inequitable (HEI = 0.557). Citizens in tail-end areas may receive little or no water. Escalate to engineering control room immediately.
Zone 5 shows moderate pressure imbalance (HEI = 0.783). Some tail-end households may face reduced pressure during peak hours. Monitor complaints and report persistent issues to engineering.
Zone 8 supply is severely inequitable (HEI = 0.483). Citizens in tail-end areas may receive little or no water. Escalate to engineering control room immediately.
